query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `failure_drill_sessions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `drillId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `score` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `payload` json,
  `feedback` text,
  `completedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);
